textByHashes.4d298d199f0be8f6bef039e50924fc23a4ee1969: Well, if she did it wasn't recently. We'd have noticed a councillor.
textByHashes.f2a062f0a2c993e2590db9437fb88a5bc93b8710: The farmers mentioned it. We haven't seen anything though. Our focus is on the lizardmen.
textByHashes.93e2c6a2c3dbec78c0b3574fa9be52f09ec8d886: The farmers said it came at night. We're not on shift then.
textByHashes.e64b04c640ee2eeb68446e871c2e85fa30cf4e23: That's not our problem. We're just here to follow orders.
textByHashes.7bab4bb8b7826278a964ac17e6fffa6753a82733: You should speak to the lieutenant.
textByHashes.5d97dd3c1ee84155aef8832864f4a6f0477421a5: I'm sorry. I didn't mean to make you feel that way. I'm not a very chatty person.
textByHashes.e443e56d58954d93e33295df01562cdac350f360: Your feelings are valid, and you deserve to be heard. That said, it might be good to examine your reaction.
textByHashes.e772124b03d2cfc9f65e77679310856283930b5c: Would you agree that people aren't under any obligation to talk to anyone else?
textByHashes.b15ab460cdd7e16da375048392e991bcf666709f: With us, it was just a misunderstanding. With somebody else, you might have been pushing a boundary.
textByHashes.7b9c7c5f2b780f49c1b927f51965ecce8317f9ec: It risks coming off as having a bit of a 'main character' complex.
textByHashes.f5e7b9747237d22dfcbb7ca978d3b02078b42370: No problem. Have a good day, friend.
textByHashes.1203e5a0f54a1459c9b9456c2067df9e1108f4aa: We're here to keep the farmers safe from the lizardmen.
textByHashes.604b8b7fda1536622db441b2e96c04fc92783fa2: Luckily the lizardmen have been focusing their efforts elsewhere. They haven't tried to come up here yet.
textByHashes.4269cac405e76eb3321e7dc33da473e90c4f3718: If they do, we can quickly call in reinforcements if required.
textByHashes.0c9c21ec908bb2b86106db153aacf26a2b890907: I want to see you sweat soldier!
textByHashes.1412d3a91a5869eb80439e35fcf47580ec0142ba: Put your back into it soldier!
textByHashes.9bd9f0222cae02b48bdfcf8c51e733842ea662f0: That dummy is the enemy. Kill it!
textByHashes.a1c6b9ef4afa777cd2f44609b51c2008775baedd: You're not out for a sunday stroll soldier!
textByHashes.4f16d63ae68f28d4c45114c752deeb9c92bdc511: My daughter can hit harder than that!
